onChange.script:
SerialNumber = self.props.text
	#get GearRation and Fill the next Field
	system.perspective.print("serial num --> %s"%SerialNumber)
	data = system.db.runNamedQuery("Project_VECV/ITSupport/getGearRatio",{"SerialNumber":SerialNumber})
	if str(data) == '0':
		message = "GearRatio not Found or Invalid Serial Number."
		state = "warning"
		Project_VECV.PopUp.Alerts.showAlert(str(state), str(state.capitalize()), str(message), "true", "Okay", "", "", "", "", "closePopup", "closePopup", "closePopup","","","","")
		self.getSibling("txtGearRatio").props.text = ''
		self.getSibling("txtGearRatio").props.enabled = False	
	else:
		self.getSibling("txtGearRatio").props.text = data
		self.getSibling("txtGearRatio").props.enabled = False

config.script:
"""
		Written By: Aniket Sagar
		Written Date: 12/01/2024
		Purpose: Number Punching
	"""	
	try:
		from java.text import SimpleDateFormat
		from java.util import Date
		
		areaName=self.session.custom.CurrentAreaName
		WorkStationName=self.session.custom.CurrentWorkStation
		system.perspective.print("Inside print btn")
		serialNumber = self.getSibling("txtSerialNumber").props.text
		serialNumber=serialNumber.upper()
		SerialNumber = serialNumber.split('-')[0]
		Model = serialNumber.split('-')[1]
		GearRatio = self.getSibling("txtGearRatio").props.text
		GearRatio=GearRatio.upper()
		shift = self.getSibling("txtShift").props.text
		shift=shift.upper()
		WorkStationID = self.getSibling("drpStation").props.value
		options = self.getSibling("drpStation").props.options
		options = system.dataset.toPyDataSet(options)
		UserName=self.getSibling("txtUser").props.text
		getUserID=system.db.runNamedQuery('Project_VECV/ITSupport/rePrint/getUsertoSave',{'UserName':UserName})
		
	#	now = Date()
	#	formatter = SimpleDateFormat("dd/MM/yyyy")
	#	formatted_date = formatter.format(now)
	#	tagDate=formatted_date
	#	system.perspective.print("Date set for NumberPunching=%s"%tagDate)
		if (areaName=='Legacy Axle'):
			WorkStationName='LAML10'
		elif (areaName=='Titan Axle'):
			WorkStationName='TAWM02'
		dateparams = {'SerialNumber': serialNumber,'WorkStationName':WorkStationName}
		dateres = system.db.runNamedQuery('Project_VECV/NumberPunching/getStartDate', dateparams)
		system.perspective.print('dateres=%s'%dateres)
		
		# Format the date
		if dateres is not None:
		    sdf = SimpleDateFormat("dd/MM/yyyy")
		    tagDate = sdf.format(dateres)
		    system.perspective.print("Date set for NumberPunching=%s"%tagDate)
		else:
		    system.perspective.print("Date cannot be found in query for serialNumber=%s"%serialNumber)
		
		WorkStation = ''
		for i in options:
			if i['value'] == WorkStationID:
				WorkStation = i['label']
				break
		if str(WorkStation).upper() == 'LAML20':
			system.tag.writeBlocking("[default]Dewas/Legacy Axle/LEGACY AXLE MAIN LINE/LAML20/Number_Punching/MES_Print", 1)
			system.tag.writeBlocking("[default]Dewas/Legacy Axle/LEGACY AXLE MAIN LINE/LAML20/Number_Punching/MODEL", Model)
			system.tag.writeBlocking("[default]Dewas/Legacy Axle/LEGACY AXLE MAIN LINE/LAML20/Number_Punching/SERIAL_NUMBER", SerialNumber)
			system.tag.writeBlocking("[default]Dewas/Legacy Axle/LEGACY AXLE MAIN LINE/LAML20/Number_Punching/Shift", shift)
			system.tag.writeBlocking("[default]Dewas/Legacy Axle/LEGACY AXLE MAIN LINE/LAML20/Number_Punching/Gear_Ratio", GearRatio)
			system.tag.writeBlocking("[default]Dewas/Legacy Axle/LEGACY AXLE MAIN LINE/LAML20/Number_Punching/Date", tagDate)
			
			
			message = "Serial Number sent for Punching successfully."
			state = "info"
			system.db.runNamedQuery("Project_VECV/ITSupport/InsertNumberPunchingStatus",{"WorkStationName":WorkStation,"SerialNumber":serialNumber,"BOMNumber":Model,"CreatedBy":getUserID})
			Project_VECV.PopUp.Alerts.showAlert(str(state), str(state.capitalize()), str(message), "true", "Okay", "", "", "", "", "closePopup", "closePopup", "closePopup","","","","")
			self.getSibling("txtSerialNumber").props.text = ''
			self.getSibling("txtGearRatio").props.text = ''
			self.getSibling("txtShift").props.text = ''
			self.getSibling("drpStation").props.value = -1
			self.getSibling("txtUser").props.text=''
			self.getSibling("txtPass").props.text=''
			self.getSibling("txtPass").props.enabled=False
			self.getSibling("txtGearRatio").props.enabled=False
			system.perspective.closePopup("rePrintSRNP")
		if str(WorkStation).upper() == 'TAML20':
			system.tag.writeBlocking("[default]Dewas/Titan Axle/TITAN MAIN LINE/TAML20/Number_Punching/MES_Print", 1)
			system.tag.writeBlocking("[default]Dewas/Titan Axle/TITAN MAIN LINE/TAML20/Number_Punching/MODEL", Model)
			system.tag.writeBlocking("[default]Dewas/Titan Axle/TITAN MAIN LINE/TAML20/Number_Punching/SERIAL_NUMBER", SerialNumber)
			system.tag.writeBlocking("[default]Dewas/Titan Axle/TITAN MAIN LINE/TAML20/Number_Punching/Shift", shift)
			system.tag.writeBlocking("[default]Dewas/Titan Axle/TITAN MAIN LINE/TAML20/Number_Punching/Gear_Ratio", GearRatio)
			system.tag.writeBlocking("[default]Dewas/Titan Axle/TITAN MAIN LINE/TAML20/Number_Punching/Date", tagDate)
			
			message = "Serial Number sent for Punching successfully."
			state = "info"
			system.db.runNamedQuery("Project_VECV/ITSupport/InsertNumberPunchingStatus",{"WorkStationName":WorkStation,"SerialNumber":serialNumber,"BOMNumber":Model,"CreatedBy":getUserID})
			Project_VECV.PopUp.Alerts.showAlert(str(state), str(state.capitalize()), str(message), "true", "Okay", "", "", "", "", "closePopup", "closePopup", "closePopup","","","","")
			self.getSibling("txtSerialNumber").props.text = ''
			self.getSibling("txtGearRatio").props.text = ''
			self.getSibling("txtShift").props.text = ''
			self.getSibling("drpStation").props.value = -1
			self.getSibling("txtUser").props.text=''
			self.getSibling("txtPass").props.text=''
			self.getSibling("txtPass").props.enabled=False
			self.getSibling("txtGearRatio").props.enabled=False
			system.perspective.closePopup("rePrintSRNP")
	except Exception as e:
		system.perspective.print('Error = %s'%e)

onChange.script:
UserName = self.props.text
	#get GearRation and Fill the next Field
	system.perspective.print("UserName --> %s"%UserName)
	data = system.db.runNamedQuery("Project_VECV/ITSupport/rePrint/authenticateUser",{"User":UserName})
	if str(data) == '0':
		message = "You Dont have access to print, Kindly Contact MES Support Team"
		state = "warning"
		Project_VECV.PopUp.Alerts.showAlert(str(state), str(state.capitalize()), str(message), "true", "Okay", "", "", "", "", "closePopup", "closePopup", "closePopup","","","","")
		self.getSibling("txtPass").props.text = ''
		self.getSibling("txtPass").props.enabled = False
		self.props.text=''	
	else:
		self.getSibling("txtPass").props.enabled=True

password='Vecv123'
	lblPass=self.props.text
	if(lblPass!=password):
		message = "Wrong Password , Please Enter correct Password"
		state = "error"
		Project_VECV.PopUp.Alerts.showAlert(str(state), str(state.capitalize()), str(message), "true", "Okay", "", "", "", "", "closePopup", "closePopup", "closePopup","","","","")
		self.props.text = ''
		self.getSibling("Button").props.enabled=False
